steps.t: Your companions assemble in Ahâba to discuss these fresh dangers.
Your companions assemble in Ahâba to discuss these fresh dangers.
According to what you learned in Emax Dûl, supply-waggons for Sûg Nidar depart from Khanâg Valoyar, south of Jiret-menêsh, in An Shêru.
Rahâzi is at Khanâg Valoyar in An Shêru.
<rgb=#00FF00>You can return to the Fearwater by using the banner at Khanâg Valoyar, in An Shêru.</rgb> Rahâzi is outside the waggon that b…
